title: Business Breakfast | Stock Market News | May 22, 2026 | TV5 Money Live

recommendations.note: Only for extreme long term; accumulate staggered. Has disappointed/corrected over decades.
recommendations.detail: Only for the extreme long term (children's-money horizon); accumulate in a staggered manner. ITC has disappointed over 30-40 yrs and has corrected. Not for 1-3 months.

recommendations.note: Only for extreme long term; accumulate staggered. Spectacular quarterly result.
recommendations.detail: Only for the extreme long term; accumulate in a staggered manner. Subdued since listing but gave a spectacular quarterly result, a reflection of capital markets. Not for 1-3 months.

recommendations.note: Attractive at this level; start buying with fresh money, good returns in 1-2 years.
recommendations.detail: Looks attractive at this level; start buying from here, good returns likely in the next one to two years. (Told caller to hold Bajaj Finance & L&T Finance rather than shift, but buy SBI with fresh money.)

recommendations.note: No big result expectation (flat/slight uptick); GLP-1 angle. Buy after results.
recommendations.detail: No big expectations for tomorrow's result (flat/slight uptick, no big surprise); Citi report on GLP-1 obesity products (18 MT capacity) is the angle. Buy after the result.

recommendations.note: Underperforming short-term but one of the largest white-goods makers; hold.
recommendations.detail: Short-term weakness but is one of the largest manufacturers of white goods; hold existing positions.

recommendations.note: Looks good on every decline; good company, add.
recommendations.detail: Looks good on every decline; add to it. Part of a good list (with Tata Power, M&M, Tata Steel, NSDL, CDSL) the caller should add to rather than buy new names.

recommendations.note: "Hyderabad scam company," upper-freeze on Cannes news; avoid entirely.
recommendations.detail: "Hyderabad scam company," 4th successive day upper-freeze on Cannes Film Festival news; avoid entirely, "put a red mark on it."

recommendations.note: Exciting space, ~Rs 25,000 cr m-cap (not cheap); hold/wait for results.
recommendations.detail: Exciting space, ~Rs 25,000 cr market cap (not cheap), ~Rs 2,200 cr turnover; hard to track yet. Hold and wait for results before deciding.

recommendations.note: Big potential; medium-to-long-term hold; target ~1,600-1,700. Book only for FOMO short term.
recommendations.detail: Never said sell in 1.5 years; continuously buy. Higher PE now but performance stabilizing q-o-q, decent profits even after capex; into a bigger orbit (~Rs 1-lakh-cr m-cap, ~1,600-1,700) once capex done. Book profits only for extreme short-term/FOMO; medium-to-long-term hold.

recommendations.note: Disinvestment restarted; recovered from ~62-63, stabilizing ~72; result decent. Average.
recommendations.detail: Add/average; disinvestment process restarted; recovered from ~62-63 to stabilize ~72; result not very great but decent enough in current environment.

recommendations.note: Hopeful AI play; hold if patient, else shift. Good company.
recommendations.detail: No-profit-no-loss; give it time/a chance (a hopeful AI play). Hold if patient, else shift.

recommendations.note: Good company; buy when it cools off, good breakouts/run-ups.
recommendations.detail: Good company with fine financials and price momentum; buy when it cools off a bit; good breakouts and excellent run-ups appear.

recommendations.detail: Recent listing; performing strongly, holding above 1,000 since listing; hold.

recommendations.detail: Range-bound roughly 175-225 since listing; result not as great as expected and stock trading weakish since; would avoid for now.
